title: Landscape Skill Output Schema
description: JSON Schema describing all CSV and JSON outputs produced by the landscape skill's strategic_scoring.py recipe.

strategic_scores_row.title: strategic_scores.csv row
strategic_scores_row.description: One row per company in the Competitive Position Index output.

company.description: Company name as returned by Cortellis.

cpi_tier.description: CPI tier bucket: A=>=75, B=>=50, C=>=25, D=<25.

cpi_score.description: Weighted Competitive Position Index score (0-100, float).

pipeline_breadth.description: Count of unique drug IDs in this company's pipeline.

phase_score.description: Sum of phase weights across all drugs (launched=5, phase3=4, phase2=3, phase1=2, discovery=1).

mechanism_diversity.description: Count of distinct mechanisms of action in the pipeline.

deal_activity.description: Number of deals where the company appears as principal or partner.

trial_intensity.description: Sum of phase2 + phase3 clinical trial counts as sponsor.

position.description: Competitive position bucket: top 20% Leaders, next 30% Challengers, rest Emerging.

mechanism_scores_row.title: mechanism_scores.csv row
mechanism_scores_row.description: One row per mechanism of action, sorted by crowding_index descending.

active_count.description: Number of unique drugs targeting this mechanism.

launched.description: Count of drugs at launched phase.

discovery.description: Count of drugs at discovery/preclinical stage.

company_count.description: Number of distinct companies with a drug targeting this mechanism.

crowding_index.description: active_count * company_count — higher means more competitive space.

opportunity_matrix_row.title: opportunity_matrix.csv row
opportunity_matrix_row.description: One row per mechanism, summarising pipeline depth and opportunity score.

companies.description: Number of companies with a drug in this mechanism.

status.description: Qualitative opportunity label derived from company_count and crowding_index.

opportunity_score.description: Composite opportunity score (higher = more attractive white-space opportunity).

totalResults.description: Total deal count reported by the Cortellis API.

fetched.description: Number of deal records actually downloaded and written to deals.csv.

phase_meta.title: *.meta.json (per phase)
phase_meta.description: Metadata file written alongside each phase CSV (launched.meta.json, phase3.meta.json, etc.).

totalResults.description: Total drug count reported by the Cortellis API for this phase query.

description: Container schema referencing all output file shapes.
